---
title: "coldsnap-analysis"
author: "Erica Griffin"
date: "2026-02-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

pacman::p_load( dplyr, lme4, MASS, lmerTest, here,ggplot2, DHARMa)

coldsnap_df <- read.csv(here("IntermediateData", "3-2-26_coldsnap_df.csv"))

coldsnap_df$Mass <- as.numeric(coldsnap_df$Mass)
```



```{r}
model1 <- lmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment + (1 | Nest), data = coldsnap_df)
summary(model1)
res <- simulateResiduals(model1)
plot(res)
```
```{r}
ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = Individual.Treatment, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, color = "pink") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "pink") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Mean TRF"  )
```

```{r}
model2 <- lmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment + Mass + (1 | Nest), data = coldsnap_df)
summary(model2)
res <- simulateResiduals(model2)
plot(res)
```

# now some temp models

```{r}
ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = incubation_max_temp, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Max Temp",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )

ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = incubation_below_18.5, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Days Below 18.5",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )

ggplot(coldsnap_df, aes(x = incubation_avg_temp, y = Mean.TRF)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0, alpha = 0.6, size = 2, color = "blue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "pink", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Incubation Average Temp",
    y = "Mean TRF"
  )
```

```{r}
model3 <- glmer(Mean.TRF ~ Individual.Treatment*incubation_max_temp + (1 | Nest), data = coldsnap_df)
summary(model3)
res <- simulateResiduals(model3)
plot(res)
```
